summary: Professional yellow-themed real estate consultant website for Elite Properties, Pune. Features business info, WhatsApp enquiry, services section, and 'most trusted real estate in Pune' branding.
architectural_notes: Yellow professional color theme throughout the website
Company name in navbar/hero must be black (not yellow) for visibility, displayed in large bold text
Tagline 'Pune's Most Trusted...' must be black colored with a professional font (not yellow)
Logo should use uploaded image asset with innovative border styling
known_issues: Company name was not visible due to yellow-on-yellow color conflict in navbar/hero

existing_features.title: Create a professional yellow-themed single-page website for 'Elite Properties Real Estate Consultant'. The visual theme must use a rich golden-yellow (#F5A000 / #FFD700 range) as the primary brand color with deep charcoal or near-black as the contrast color, premium serif/sans-serif typography pairing, and a luxury real estate aesthetic. Apply the theme consistently across all sections with polished card layouts, bold section headers, and subtle shadow/depth effects.

Build a full-width hero section at the top of the page featuring: the business name 'Elite Properties Real Estate Consultant' in English prominently, the Hindi name 'एलिट प्रोपर्टीज रियल एस्टेट कंसलटेंट' as a subtitle, and the tagline 'Pune's Most Trusted Real Estate Business'. Include the hero background image (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.jpg) as the section background with a semi-transparent yellow overlay. Add a prominent 'WhatsApp Enquiry' CTA button.

Create a Services section displaying all services extracted from the uploaded images as styled cards or a grid. Services to include: Property Buying and Sales, Property Management, Property Rentals, Property Development, Property Investing, Property Sales Management, Vacation Properties, Civil Works Finance Consultant, Online Agreement, Property Valuation Reports, Appraisals, Building Lot Sales, Commercial Property Buying and Sales, Farm Sales, First-Time Home Buyer Services, Furnished Property Rentals and Sales, Land Leasing and Sales, Loans, Luxury Properties, New Construction Sales and Leasing. Each service card should have a relevant icon and yellow accent styling.

Create a Business Info / Contact section displaying: address 'Zala Society Building No 1, Office No 6, First Floor, Karve Rd, Near Karishma Chowk, Kothrud, Pune, Maharashtra 411038', business hours 'Mon–Sun: 9:30 AM – 8:30 PM', phone number '095279 42323', and a WhatsApp Enquiry button that opens WhatsApp chat to +91 95279 42323. Style this section with yellow accents and professional layout.

Add a sticky navigation bar at the top with the Elite Properties logo/brand name and navigation links: Home, Services, About, Contact. The navbar should use yellow as the background or accent color and remain fixed on scroll.

Add an 'About / Why Choose Us' section highlighting trust and expertise. Include stats or highlights such as 'Most Trusted in Pune', 'Expert Consultants', 'End-to-End Property Services'. Use yellow icon badges and professional copy.
Add a footer with the business name (English + Hindi), address, phone, WhatsApp link, business hours, and a copyright line. Style with dark background and yellow accent text.

Replace the current navbar logo with a new, distinctive logo design for 'Elite Properties Real Estate Consultant'. The logo should use an innovative visual mark (e.g., a stylized building, key, or crown icon combined with 'EP' monogram) that stands out against the yellow/gold navbar background. The logo should be rendered as an SVG or inline component — not dependent on any external image file.

Change the company name text 'Elite Properties Real Estate Consultant' in the navbar to deep black (#111111 or similar near-black), increase its font size to make it prominently visible, and apply bold weight. Ensure this resolves the yellow-on-yellow invisibility issue so the name is clearly legible at all times including when scrolled.

In the Hero section, change the tagline text 'Pune's Most Trusted Real Estate Business' to deep black (#111111 or similar near-black). Replace its current font with a professional serif font (e.g., Playfair Display, already available in the project) to maintain a luxury real estate aesthetic. Ensure the text remains clearly legible against the hero background at all times.

Replace the current SVG logo in Navbar.tsx with the uploaded Elite Properties logo image (elite-logo.dim_300x300.png). Render it as an tag referencing the generated asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/elite-logo.dim_300x300.png. Wrap the logo image in an innovative circular or rounded-square border using a gold-to-silver gradient ring (e.g., a CSS border with gradient or a box-shadow ring in gold #C9A84C / silver #A8A8A8 tones) to give it a premium, stand-out appearance against the navbar background.

Refine the overall site theme to a more professional, premium color palette. Shift the primary accent from bright yellow (#FFD700) to a rich champagne gold (#C9A84C / #B8952A range) paired with deep charcoal (#1A1A1A) and platinum silver (#E8E8E8) as supporting tones. Update Tailwind config gold color tokens and CSS custom properties accordingly. Apply this refined palette consistently across the navbar, hero overlay, section headers, card borders, button backgrounds, icon badges, and footer accents. The result should feel sophisticated and upscale rather than high-visibility yellow.

In the Navbar, increase the font size of the 'Elite Properties Real Estate Consultant' company name text to make it significantly more prominent — target approximately text-2xl or text-3xl on desktop. Apply font-extrabold weight and ensure the color remains deep black (#111111). In the Hero section, similarly increase the size of the primary 'Elite Properties Real Estate Consultant' heading to a larger scale (e.g., text-5xl or text-6xl on desktop) with bold/extrabold weight so it commands attention.

In the Services section (Services.tsx), visually highlight the 'Commercial Property Buying and Sales' service card as a featured/hero card. Give it a prominent gold gradient border or a gold background badge labeled 'Featured', increase its card size or apply a distinct elevated shadow, and add a 'Commercial Rent & Sale' label/tag in bold gold text. Ensure it visually stands out from all other service cards in the grid.

In the Hero section (Hero.tsx), update the tagline / trust line text from its current value to: 'Your Trusted Partner for Commercial and Residential Purchase or Leasing'. Keep the deep black (#111111) color and Playfair Display serif font that was applied in the previous version. Ensure this line is prominently placed beneath the business name and above the CTA buttons.

In Services.tsx, relocate the featured 'Commercial Property Buying and Sales / Commercial Rent & Sale' highlighted card so it appears as a standalone prominent section immediately after the Hero section and before the main Services grid. It should be rendered outside the Services grid — positioned between the Hero and the full Services section in App.tsx.

Update the icon on the standalone Commercial Rent & Sale featured card to use the uploaded Elite Properties logo image (elite-logo.dim_300x300.png) referenced from frontend/public/assets/generated/elite-logo.dim_300x300.png, rendered as an tag. Replace the current icon/emoji with this logo image, sized appropriately (e.g., 64x64 or 80x80px) within the card.

Add a prominent gold gradient border to the standalone Commercial Rent & Sale featured card. Use a CSS gradient border or box-shadow ring in champagne gold (#C9A84C) to deep gold (#B8952A) tones, with sufficient border width (e.g., 2–3px) so the card boundary is clearly visible and premium-looking.

In Navbar.tsx, add the Elite Properties logo image (referenced from frontend/public/assets/generated/elite-logo.dim_300x300.png, rendered as an tag) immediately before the company name text 'Elite Properties Real Estate Consultant'. Apply the same gold-to-silver gradient ring border styling (box-shadow or CSS gradient ring in #C9A84C / #A8A8A8 tones) that is currently used on the logo in the standalone FeaturedCommercialCard section. Size the logo appropriately for the navbar (e.g., 40x40 or 48x48px) and ensure it aligns vertically with the company name text.

new_feature_requests.summary: Hero section with 'Most Trusted Real Estate Business in Pune' tagline and yellow professional theme
Business info section: address (Zala Society, Karve Rd, Kothrud, Pune), timing 9:30-8:30, WhatsApp enquiry button (095279 42323)
Services section showcasing real estate consultant services
Bilingual branding: English 'Elite Properties Real Estate Consultant' and Hindi 'एलिट प्रोपर्टीज रियल एस्टेट कंसलटेंट'
Update company logo to a different/new design and change company name text color to black (was yellow/invisible) and make it bigger
Change 'Pune's Most Trusted Real Estate Business' tagline text to black color and update to a professional font
Replace logo with uploaded image, add innovative border styling to the logo
Change theme color to a more professional look (refine color scheme)
Make 'Elite Properties' name bigger/more prominent in navbar/hero
Highlight 'Commercial Rent & Sale' as a featured/prominent service
Update tagline/hero line to 'Your Trusted Partner for Commercial and Residential Purchase or Leasing'
Move the highlighted 'Commercial Rent & Sale' featured card to appear after the 1st page/hero section, change its icon to match the uploaded logo image, and add a border to it
Use the same logo image (as used in the Commercial Rent & Sale featured card) in the navbar, placed before the company name
